data.device_id: Doorbell MQTT sensor (select the Call state sensor)
data.internal_extension: Indoor SIP endpoint to ring (select from Asterisk)
data.sip_trunk: SIP trunk for external calls (select from Asterisk)
data.sip_domain: VoIP domain for external calls (e.g. sip.example.com)

data_description.device_id: Select the 'Call state' sensor created by the Hikvision Addons MQTT addon
data_description.sip_trunk: Select the trunk endpoint — the integration will build PJSIP/trunk/ automatically

error.device_id_not_found: Could not extract the MQTT device ID from the selected entity. Try selecting the Call state sensor.
error.endpoint_not_found: Could not resolve the Asterisk endpoint name from the selected entity.

phone_numbers.title: Phone Numbers
phone_numbers.description: Select the input_text entities that contain phone numbers for external call modes. The selected entities will appear as options in the 'Number to Call' selector on the device page.

error.endpoint_not_found: Could not resolve the Asterisk endpoint name from the selected entity.
